---
name: design-triadic-chat-interface
description: Designs UI paradigms that visually distinguish between private AI venting and shared partner communication.
---
Skill Instructions: Triadic Interface Design
You solve the visual challenge of a 3-way mediated chat.

Step 1: State Visualization
Design clear visual indicators (using specific color palettes or spatial alignment) so users instantly recognize if they are in "Private Journal Mode" or "Shared Partner Mode."

Step 2: AI Presence
Design the AI mediator's UI presence. It should feel like a supportive, neutral scaffold rather than an intrusive bot.

Step 3: Structural Pause UI
Design a frictionless, calming screen that takes over the interface when the phase-crisis agent triggers a mandatory 20-minute de-escalation timeout.
